Nut-Aware Restaurants in Daytona Beach

Browse 4 restaurants in Daytona Beach, Central Florida, that offer nut-aware options. Each listing shows its latest health inspection grade and diner ratings.

4 nut-aware restaurants

  • A 98 C
    COLD STONE CREAMERY Other ★ 4.8 (2824) Daytona Beach · Volusia County Nut-aware Inspected Jul 2025
  • A 94 C
    CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL #783 Mexican ★ 3.7 (1457) Daytona Beach · Volusia County VeganVeg +6 more Inspected Dec 2025
  • A 91 H
    HIBACHI GRILL SUPREME BUFFET Chinese ★ 4.2 (6974) Daytona Beach · Volusia County VeganVeg +3 more Inspected Mar 2026
  • A 90 H
    HIGH TIDE KITCHEN Cafe ★ 4.5 (1306) Daytona Beach · Volusia County VegKeto +3 more Inspected Apr 2026
